design_philosophy: Cozy, bright, young, and social. Emulating a casual mobile game and social app blend. UI should feel like a cute digital room. High use of rounded chunky shapes, pastel colors, and character-driven interactions.

typography.headings: text-2xl to text-4xl, font-black, tracking-tight, text-[#2D3436]

layout_and_spacing.container: Since it is a mobile app clone built on web, use a mobile-first container: max-w-md mx-auto h-screen bg-[#FFFBF5] relative overflow-hidden shadow-2xl sm:rounded-[40px] sm:border-8 border-white sm:my-8
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6. Generous spacing for a soft, breathable feel
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Extremely rounded. Use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for cards, rounded-full for buttons and avatars.

components.buttons: Chunky, bright. bg-[#FFB5B5] text-white rounded-full py-4 px-6 shadow-[0_4px_0_#E59393] active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none transition-all
components.cards: bg-white rounded-3xl p-5 shadow-sm border border-[#F3E8E0]
components.bottom_nav: Fixed at bottom inside the max-w-md container. bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl h-20 rounded-t-[32px] flex justify-around items-center px-6 shadow-[0_-10px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] z-50
components.chat_drawer: Shadcn Drawer component, customized with rounded-t-[32px] bg-[#FFFBF5].
components.avatars: Placed absolutely inside the room view. Use framer-motion for slight floating/bouncing idle animation.

features_and_flows.login: Google login button centered, huge app title, floating avatar images in background. Must be emergent agent Google login.
features_and_flows.room_view: The main home page. Full container background uses room_bg. Furniture items are draggable (framer-motion drag) or absolute positioned. Friends' avatars appear here.
features_and_flows.chat: Accessible via bottom nav or clicking a friend. 1-on-1 and group chat inside the room.
features_and_flows.friends_list: Tab with list of friends, 'Add Friend' button, request management.

images.description: The cozy isometric room background where avatars and furniture are placed
Cute girl avatar in pastel hoodie

assets.icons: Use lucide-react with strokeWidth={2.5} for a chunky, cute feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application in a mobile-first simulated container: <div className='max-w-md mx-auto h-screen relative bg-[#FFFBF5] overflow-hidden sm:border-8 sm:border-white sm:rounded-[40px] sm:shadow-2xl sm:my-8'>
All text content and interface strings MUST be in Traditional Chinese (繁體中文).
Use framer-motion to make elements feel playful and alive (e.g., scale on tap, avatars bobbing gently up and down).
Implement Google Login for authentication (Emergent Google community login).

The Home tab is the 'Small House' (小屋). Set the background image to the room_bg asset. Place the furniture and avatar images absolutely within this view. Implement drag-and-drop for furniture if possible using framer-motion's `drag` prop.
Friends List should allow viewing friends and 'visiting' their rooms. You can add friends by code/username.
Do not use generic Shadcn square borders. Override shadcn primitives to have `rounded-3xl`, soft pastel backgrounds, and remove sharp edges.
